svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="claude-ecosystem" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-644" dy="-230" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1240" pageHeight="920" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;align=left;" value="~/.claude harness — four layers" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="500" x="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane1" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;horizontal=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;html=1;pointerEvents=0;" value="1 · Session modes — hooks, always-on" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="1160" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="caveman" parent="lane1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="caveman
terse output" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="100" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="elucidate" parent="lane1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="elucidate
plain-English comments" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="480" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ponytail" parent="lane1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="ponytail
YAGNI / stdlib-first" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="860" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane2" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;horizontal=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;html=1;pointerEvents=0;" value="2 · Plugins" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="1160" x="40" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="superpowers" parent="lane2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="superpowers
workflow discipline" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="100" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="codex" parent="lane2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="codex
second-opinion rescue" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="480" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="drawio" parent="lane2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="drawio ★ new
diagram export layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="860" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane3" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;horizontal=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontStyle=1;html=1;pointerEvents=0;" value="3 · Standalone skills" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="1160" x="40" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="preset" parent="lane3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="preset
prompt library + loop bodies" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="210" x="60" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="relay" parent="lane3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="relay
self-relaying loops" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="340" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hp" parent="lane3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="/hp
happy-path MVD" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="620" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="trace" parent="lane3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="/trace
flow tracing" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="900" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="llmkb" parent="lane3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="llm-kb
wiki vaults" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="210" x="60" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="audit" parent="lane3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="ecosystem-audit
audit + template sync" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="340" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mattp" parent="lane3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="mattpocock lifecycle
spec → tickets → implement" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="620" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="design" parent="lane3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="impeccable family
design skills" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="900" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane4" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;horizontal=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontStyle=1;html=1;pointerEvents=0;" value="4 · Infrastructure — files, not sessions" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="1160" x="40" y="720" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vault" parent="lane4" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;boundedLbl=1;" value="ecosystem-kb
vault (this map)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="210" x="60" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="template" parent="lane4" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#666666;" value="template/IN USE
→ MY-SKILLS repo" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="340" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcp" parent="lane4" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#666666;" value="MCP servers
UnityMCP · pencil" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="620" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="memory" parent="lane4" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#666666;" value="auto-memory
lineup pattern" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="900" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="relay" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="preset" value="wraps /loop"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="hp" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.35;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="drawio" value="Mermaid → export"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="trace" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.65;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="drawio" value="seqlayout / flows"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="llmkb" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="vault" value="builds + lints"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="audit" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="template" value="mirrors"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="audit" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.75;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="vault" value="reconciles"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
